name: Cooked Cucumber Salad- Oi Bok Kum Na Mool
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp White Sesame Seeds, Toasted and Ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumber and cut into wide strips, discarding the seed core.
2. Cut the cucumber crosswise into sticks.
3. Place the cucumber in a colander and sprinkle with salt. Let stand for 10 minutes to drain.
4. Rinse the cucumber thoroughly and dry it.
5. Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the cucumber and chopped green onion, stirring until the cucumber begins to soften.
6. Add soy sauce, chili powder, and sugar. Toss until seasonings are evenly distributed.
7. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and sprinkle with toasted white sesame seeds.
8. Serve warm or slightly chilled.
